__metadata__.framework_name: State-based Glamour prompts (bikini portraits in particular)
__metadata__.changelog: Initial stable release of the state-based Master Prompt. Implemented phenotype libraries and dynamic fabric physics.
__metadata__.description: State-based declarative prompt architecture for diffusion models. Developed and tested on Nano Banana 2.

subject_global.eyes: clear bright catchlights, iris color clearly visible
body: narrow midriff countering the anatomical fullness
chest: cinematic lighting to emphasize muscle depth
an unfathomably gigantic, massive natural chest
subject_global.garment: skin-tight minimal-coverage dental floss bikini swimsuit

bikini_top: halterneck tiny trignale bikini top with white straps
equipped with drawstring channels in underbust
underboob and sideboob clearly left out of the tiny top
bikini_top_cling: the tiny top firmly clinging to the chest
bikini_bottom: high-leg tanga string G-string micro bikini bottom
firmly clinging to the waist and the crotch
bikini_straps: significant flesh displacement along the underbust and the waist
fabric deeply recessed into the torso
cinematic contact shadows to emphasize depth

material_physics: High-elasticity textile under intense structural tension
neck straps experiencing tight tension due to anatomical fullness
fabric surface displaying micro-stretch lines along the stress vectors
anatomical_interaction: Stretched textile firmly pressing and contouring the form
natural, realistic displacement of elastic tissue beneath the borders
healthy, organic compression where the material binds to the silhouette

features: High, straight, prominently projected nasal bridge

shape: clear sky-blue, pale green, or light hazel irises

skin_tone: pronounced cool pink and rosy undertones
texture: intense pink subsurface scattering on the ears and fingers

african_american_phenotype.skin_tone: Rich umber, warm golden and terracotta undertones

features: soft nose bridge with a gentle flare

shape: Elongated, elegant East Asian eye aperture
high internal clarity and crisp iris definition
subtle, natural asymmetry between left and right fold

cheekbones: flat facial profile with minimal projection

eyelids: prominent and plump tear bags (aegyo-sal / namida-bukuro)

material_fidelity.texture: Soft-focus peach-skin finish, subtle dewy glow on the nose tip and cheeks
material_fidelity.adornment: Soft, wispy see-through bangs framing the forehead

geometry: Clings closely to the temples and cheeks
frames the face in a sharp vertical line
bluntly cut ends falling over the shoulders
material_fidelity: High-gloss mirror sheen reflecting the strobes

style: Immaculate, ultra-straight long K-pop hair texture
subjected to a subtle, unpredictable ambient air current
flexibility: Strands separate and drift organically based on chaotic airflow
spontaneous, natural kinetic movement around the shoulders
zero frozen or static styling, fluid atmospheric interaction

style: forehead skin clearly visible through strands
geometry: Bangs cut precisely at the eyebrow line
slender side pieces contouring the cheekbones

eyes_lips: sheer glossy light pink lip tint

skin_finish: intense subsurface scattering on the ears and philtrum
dewy, high-specular hydration restricted to the cheek crests
features_accent: Expertly feathered, individual eyebrow hair rendering
naked lash line with clear gloss separation
softly blurred, natural lip border with a raw berry stain finish

skin_finish: high-specular liquid gel highlights on cheekbones
eyes_and_lips: Clear vinyl lip-gloss overlay with high dimensionality
wet-look glossy eyelids reflecting the studio strobes

skin_finish: zero oily specularity, completely velvet texture
soft-focus diffusion across the skin gradient
contour_and_tones: Deep charcoal and ash-brown bone contouring
muted desaturated plum or dark terracotta matte lips
smoky, diffused graphite eyeshadow framing the sockets

skin_finish: subtle brightening on the center T-zone
eyes_and_highlights: glitter placed precisely on the lower teardrop line
sharp, tight liquid black eyeliner extending outward
pointy, individual K-pop cluster lash extensions
lips: saturated color concentrated at the inner center

eyes_and_contour: Muted monochrome ash-rose or beige eyeshadow
softly defined aegyo-sal using natural shadows
lips: Overlined lip borders with a matte nude-rose lip pencil

skin_finish: Translucent glass-skin base with high-specularity properties
micro-hydration layers that react dynamically to the studio axes
flexibility: Glints of light and facial highlights shift spontaneously with the angle
organic variations in pigment blending under the strobe exposure

ocular_tension: Subtle, micro-tension in the orbicularis oculi muscles
slight, barely perceptible narrowing of the lower eyelids
intense internal focus and intelligent clarity in the pupils
mid_face_dynamics: Relaxed but fully conscious facial muscle tone
slight asymmetrical elevation of one eyebrow crest
zero vacant stare, active emotional presence

oral_tension: Faint, microscopic lift at the very corners of the lips
subtle tension in the zygomaticus major muscles
lips remain closed, maintaining a soft natural seal
eye_interaction: Warm, responsive crinkling at the outer eye corners
gaze communicates a direct, intimate connection with the viewer

composition: Dynamic standing contrapposto posture with asymmetric weight distribution
primary body weight heavily anchored to one load-bearing leg
opposite hip dropped slightly, creating an organic pelvic tilt
shoulder axis angled counter to the tilt of the hips
subtle, natural three-dimensional S-curve running through the spine
camera_relation: Torso rotated roughly 30 to 45 degrees away from the lens axis
head turned back smoothly to maintain direct eye-contact
dynamic foreshortening that establishes depth across the shoulders

composition: Casual, relaxed seated posture on the floor
camera_relation: Gazing naturally toward the large format lens

spatial_physics: Subject is partially supported by an ambient horizontal architectural element
natural structural compression where the body meets the surface
organic weight adaptation to the local environment geometry
atmospheric_state: Warm, multi-directional high-intensity studio strobe arrays
photons catching microscopic skin hydration layers dynamically
subtle, chaotic airborne micro-currents affecting loose fabric edges

material_fidelity.organic_surfaces: Luminous skin, micro-detailed pores, realistic sweat-sheen

optics.focus_profile: Hyper-thin focal plane, sharp iris to soft-ear transition

rendering_constraints.negatives: Anti-CGI, no plastic skin, no 3D-render smoothness

DEPRECATED_ARCHIVE._comment: Everything inside this block is ignored by the active compiler

_comment: active phenotypes: (nilotic_obsidian), (slavic_sculptural), anglo_saxon_transparent, (latin_mediterranean_phenotype), (proto_east_asian), african_american_phenotype, kpop_visual_center, kpop_premium, japanese_idol, (monolid_north_east_asian_phenotype)

active makeups: gravure_natural, glamour_heavy, makeup_hauté_couture, makeup_cyber_gloss, makeup_editorial_matte_noir, (makeup_retro_city_pop), makeup_kpop_stage_glitter, (makeup_kpop_kwajup_juicy), makeup_kpop_luxury_ambassador

rendering_constraint: zero violet or blue color bleed onto walls
strictly eliminate vacant or dead-eyed expressions
force micro-tension in facial muscles for psychological depth
allow high micro-variation and chaotic fluid detail in every generation loop
